title: coreopsis pubescens var. debilis
intro: Coreopsis pubescens var. debilis, also known as a hairy coreopsis, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the aster family. The hairy coreopsis is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, reduce fever, and soothe digestive problems. The hairy coreopsis can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
